scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch(e){}}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||process.env.npm_execpath||''; if(!ua.includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.deploy: pnpm --dir artifacts/acams-prep-video build && echo 'Push main to trigger GitHub Pages deployment'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
